name: Invoice: Create

description.en: Generate a professional PDF invoice from line items — ideal for freelancers, contractors, and service providers who need to bill clients for completed work. Provide titles, quantities, and unit prices to create a downloadable invoice document stored in your team library.
description.de: Erstelle eine professionelle PDF-Rechnung aus einzelnen Positionen – ideal für Freiberufler, Auftragnehmer und Dienstleister, die Kunden für abgeschlossene Arbeiten abrechnen müssen. Gib Titel, Mengen und Einzelpreise an, um ein herunterladbares Rechnungsdokument zu erstellen, das in deiner Team-Mediathek gespeichert wird.
description.es: Generate a professional PDF invoice from line items — ideal for freelancers, contractors, and service providers who need to bill clients for completed work. Provide titles, quantities, and unit prices to create a downloadable invoice document stored in your team library.
description.fr: Generate a professional PDF invoice from line items — ideal for freelancers, contractors, and service providers who need to bill clients for completed work. Provide titles, quantities, and unit prices to create a downloadable invoice document stored in your team library.
description.ro: Generate a professional PDF invoice from line items — ideal for freelancers, contractors, and service providers who need to bill clients for completed work. Provide titles, quantities, and unit prices to create a downloadable invoice document stored in your team library.
description.it: Generate a professional PDF invoice from line items — ideal for freelancers, contractors, and service providers who need to bill clients for completed work. Provide titles, quantities, and unit prices to create a downloadable invoice document stored in your team library.

bot: Trigger for freelancers, contractors, handymen, electricians, plumbers, or any service provider billing for labor and materials. Use when the user wants to bill a client or create a payment request.

inputs.name: Buyer Name
inputs.bot: The name of the customer or company to bill.

inputs.name: Buyer Address
inputs.bot: The billing address of the customer.

inputs.name: Line Items
inputs.bot: Array of objects with title, quantity, and unitPrice (in cents). Pass as JSON array.

description.en: Fallback: single line item unit price in cents

inputs.name: Notes
inputs.bot: Optional internal notes or message for the customer.
